docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY PARADIGM GROUP INC.DBA IMAGING & DIAGNOSTIC SERVIC AS TO DEFENDANT MAZHARI, NILOUFAR ATTORNEY AT LAW. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-04-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-09-2001 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAZHARI, NILOUFAR ATTORNEY AT LAW.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARADIGM GROUP INC.DBA IMAGING & DIAGNOSTIC SERVIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAZHARI, NILOUFAR ATTORNEY AT LAW. $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAZHARI, NILOUFAR ATTORNEY AT LAW. HEARING SET FOR JUL-23-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-23-2001, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-04-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-20-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED IN THERE IS NO APPEARANCES ON 8/20 THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MAZHARI, NILOUFAR ATTORNEY AT LAW. NO APPEARANCE. DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
